title: Bountiful x Cobblemon - Catcher's Decree
description: An example addon to show how to add catching Pokemon types as requirements for the Bountiful mod's bounty system.
body:
An example addon to show how to add catching Pokemon types as requirements for the Bountiful mod's bounty system.

Adds a catch objective for each type, with a minimum count of 3, and a max of 10.
Adds an item reward for each Pokeball type, adjusted based on their max catch rate bonus.

[Come visit us on the Discord!](https://discord.gg/WKAR27SdSv)
